name: 【150】英会話（特）I　１／Oral English I(For Teacher's License)
担当者: ギルバート　Ｊ．Ｅ．（GILBERT JOAN ELIZABETH）
成績評価備考:
備考　Note
This course measures achievement of the objectives (as listed in the "Learning Goals" section) through in-class assignments, news assignments, quizzes, impromptu speeches, presentations, and in-class examinations.
In-class examinations are considered essential to this course.
